title: Marbella Port Speedboat Hire: Group Costs and Tips for 2026
html:
If you are planning a day on the water with friends, Marbella Port is an ideal departure point for speedboat hire in groups. Prices typically start from €600 for a half-day charter, and BoatHire24 makes it easy to compare options. The Mediterranean here offers calm seas and countless coves.

How much does it cost to rent a speedboat for a group in Marbella Port?

Prices for a group speedboat hire in Marbella Port range from €600 for a half-day to over €2,500 for a full-day crewed charter.

Most boats accommodate 8 to 12 guests, so the cost per person can be as low as €75. To find the best options, you can browse boats for your dates and compare verified listings. Rates vary by season and boat size.

Where to set off in Marbella Port

Marbella Port has several departure points including Puerto Deportivo de Marbella, the main marina with full facilities. Nearby, Puerto José Banús offers a glamorous start point with superyacht views. From there, you can head to Cabopino Marina or anchor at Playa de la Fontanilla. Further west, Puerto de la Duquesa is a quieter base for exploring the coastline.

Popular destinations include the island of Isla de las Palomas and the bay of San Pedro de Alcántara, both within a 10-nautical-mile run. For a longer trip, motor east to Cala de Mijas or the cliffs of Maro.

Which boat to rent

Here is a selection of speedboat types ideal for group hire:

  1. Axopar 28, best for coastal cruising and watersports; seats 10 guests; from €750 half-day.
  2. Fairline 36, best for comfort and speed; seats 8 guests; from €1,200 half-day.
  3. Azimut 42, best for luxury day trips; seats 12 guests; from €1,800 full-day.
  4. Rib tender, best for adrenaline and access to shallow coves; seats 6 guests; from €500 half-day.

One popular option is the Limpopo, an Axopar 28 with a modern design. You can view this speedboat listing for full specs and availability.

Cost breakdown for group boat hire

  • Shared group tour on a speedboat: from €100 per person for a 3-hour trip.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4, 6 guests): from €400 total.
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 12 guests): from €1,500 total.
  • Crewed yacht full-day (8 guests with skipper and host): from €2,000 total.

Fuel is often extra; confirm with the operator before booking. Many boats include snorkelling equipment and a cooler box.

Do you need a licence to rent a speedboat in Marbella Port?

In Spain, you generally need a recreational boating licence for boats over 15 horsepower, but each operator will confirm exact requirements for their vessel.

If you plan to explore the coves between Marbella and Estepona, take the morning breeze; the poniente wind picks up after noon and can make mooring tricky.

The high season runs from June to September, when the levante wind occasionally affects the eastern approaches. Always check local weather forecasts.

At a glance

  • Price band: €600, €2,500 for group speedboat hire.
  • Peak months: June, July, August, September.
  • Trip length: Half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours).
  • Guest capacity: 8, 12 guests typical.
  • Currency: EUR.

Questions about boat rental in Marbella Port

Can I bring my own food and drink on a speedboat hire?

Most operators allow you to bring your own provisions, though some offer catering upgrades for an extra fee.

Is there parking near Marbella Port for my car?

Yes, the main marina at Puerto Deportivo has paid parking garages within a 5-minute walk of the departure pontoons.

What happens if the weather is bad on my booking day?

Operators typically offer a full refund or reschedule if the captain deems conditions unsafe; check the cancellation policy at booking.

Can I hire a skipper with the speedboat?

Yes, most group hires include a professional skipper; if you have a licence, you can request a bareboat charter for a lower rate.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella Port or list your own. For more options, browse the listings or consider listing your boat to earn extra income. If you own a vessel, becoming a host is simple and free to start in 2026.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella Port and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
